solution:
def countSegments(self, s: str) -> int:
    count = 0
    for i in range(len(s)):
        if s[i] != ' ':
            count += 1
    return count

efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW

Explanation: The solution iterates through the string character by character, keeping track of the number of non-space characters encountered. This approach has a time complexity of O(n), where n is the length of the string. Since only a constant amount of space is used (O(1)), the space complexity is also low.
